creator: empty.japan
caption:
You are not gonna believe how I’ve found the place shown in the video 😅 I missed my bus stop and ended up in the middle of nowhere. The temple was nearby so I had no other choice but to check it out. It was absolutely empty, no tourists, no locals… It felt so tranquil and authentic.
Recently I realized that all of my best discoveries happened so randomly 😅
I either took a wrong bus/train or simply was taking a ride on a car to some unexplored area. 
I have something really special to show you in the future reels and the upcoming travel guides for my fellow travellers 🤫
This was the 4th video from my top 10 list of places where you will not meet any tourists.
📍 Kuhonji Temple 九品寺 Nantan, Kyoto
